component.name: Feather PDF
component.summary: Light on the system, full-featured on PDF

description.p: Feather PDF is a native, open-source PDF application for Linux, aiming at Adobe Acrobat-class capability without a web view. It pairs an Acrobat-style tabbed workspace with native GNOME theming.

ul.li: A custom render pipeline that opens large documents instantly and scrolls smoothly
A tabbed workspace, one document per tab
Home start screen with recent files and drag-and-drop
